network_summary: Both locations are Aspen Dental offices operating under the Aspen Dental friendly-PC model. MENA DENTAL PLLC (Skokie, ZIP 60077) lists ADMI CORP (Aspen Dental Management, Inc.) as parent_company in NPPES. DELGADO DMD PLLC (Chicago Roscoe Village, ZIP 60618) is listed as affiliated_dso=Aspen Dental in NPPES and confirmed on the Aspen Dental public locator. Christine Barber is a corporate authorized official at ADMI who appears on multiple friendly-PC PLLCs across the Aspen network — she is not a dentist-owner. ADMI is PE-backed by Ares Management, Leonard Green & Partners, and American Securities. Both offices are confirmed on the Aspen Dental public locator (aspendental.com). This is a textbook branded_dso cluster with pe_backed=true.
owner_operator_identity: ADMI Corp (Aspen Dental Management, Inc.) — corporate MSO/management entity; Christine Barber is an ADMI corporate authorized official/admin, not a dentist-owner. Practice-level owners: Dr. Roda Mena (Skokie), Dr. Roxanna Delgado Rodriguez (Chicago).
durable_artifacts: NPPES NPI 1689460834 (MENA DENTAL PLLC, 5225 Touhy Ave Skokie IL 60077) lists parent_company=ADMI CORP
NPPES NPI 1659170637 (DELGADO DMD PLLC, 3201 N Western Ave Chicago IL 60618) lists affiliated_dso=Aspen Dental
Shared authorized official CHRISTINE BARBER on both NPI records — corporate ADMI officer, not dentist-owner
aspendental.com locator confirms 5225 W Touhy Ave Skokie IL 60077 as active Aspen Dental office (Dr. Roda Mena, owner)
aspendental.com locator confirms 3201 N Western Ave Chicago IL 60618 as active Aspen Dental office (Dr. Roxanna Delgado Rodriguez, owner)
mso_platform_pe_evidence: ADMI CORP = Aspen Dental Management, Inc., the national DSO management/MSO platform behind the Aspen Dental brand. PE-backed by Ares Management, L.P. and Leonard Green & Partners, L.P. (increased equity 2017, in partnership with American Securities, LLC). Source: https://www.leonardgreen.com/ares-management-leonard-green-increase-ownership-in-aspen-dental-management-inc/
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Christine Barber AO cluster is a corporate admin artifact — ADMI places a corporate officer as NPPES authorized official on many friendly-PC PLLCs nationwide. The two PLLCs are separately registered but both are active Aspen Dental offices confirmed on the public locator. No false positive: both offices are genuinely corporate Aspen Dental.
evidence_chain: AO signal: Christine Barber appears as authorized official on NPI 1689460834 (MENA DENTAL PLLC, Skokie) and NPI 1659170637 (DELGADO DMD PLLC, Chicago), two distinct watched-IL GP locations across ZIPs 60077 and 60618. NPPES itself provides the first documentary link: MENA DENTAL PLLC lists parent_company=ADMI CORP; DELGADO DMD PLLC lists affiliated_dso=Aspen Dental. Web search confirmed ADMI CORP = Aspen Dental Management, Inc., the national DSO MSO. aspendental.com locator pages confirm both addresses as active Aspen Dental offices. PE backing confirmed via Leonard Green & Partners press release (Ares + Leonard Green + American Securities). Documentary corroboration is strong: NPPES parent_company + locator URL + PE filing.
future_app_notes: ADMI-managed Aspen Dental friendly-PCs use a pattern of listing a corporate officer (not the dentist-owner) as the NPPES authorized official — this is how Christine Barber appears across two PLLCs. When sweeping for other Aspen Dental PLLCs in the IL dataset, check for other ADMI corporate AO names as a signal. These two locations should already be classified dso_national=Aspen Dental in the IL GP denominator; verify entity_classification in practice_locations.
